当末世来临，寿命成为通行货币……
只是一场淅淅沥沥的小雨——却仿佛是末日来临的宣告，接踵而来的灾难层出不穷。
灰雾、炎日、冰寒……
病菌、辐射、饥荒……
和平已久的蓝星进入了末世……寿命时代。
————
在末日挣扎求生数年的云熙，终于欧皇附体，一枚时空重置卡的出现，让她回到了末日开始之前。
重来一次，卡牌、寿命、囤货……
然云熙突然发现，她‘未来’赚取的寿命总额居然被没有重置？2000多年……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1b42c174ee115589cd0f09fe16dee051","author":"喵大皇","author_id":"","book_id":"7106673737700740108","book_name":"天灾末日，全民抽卡游戏","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203870","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8023人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":494,"name":"囤物资","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=494&name=囤物资&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":523,"name":"前世今生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=523&name=前世今生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7106676857688293929","read_count":"8023","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1167611"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"575","tags":"科幻末世,系统,重生,空间,末世,囤物资,前世今生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/3543814840c2f3bec1acf3e1b0151133~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429926&x-signature=JqlT4Am65W5TLSfP1IE0vovkFgk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3382546414974574","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.6567521e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323140526EF44C849614E18E649C4"}"},"relate_ info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":48,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10425,"reply_count":15,"show_pv":26988},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1664346900,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7145615984853533481","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的超级喜欢这样的文，不是局限于女主一人身上不停写极品，虽然末世就是会有极品，不过亲戚之间没有什么特别极品的一直缠在女主身上吸血，女主也善良却不圣母，全文基本是从国家的方面写末世，这个角度就感觉整个视角很大，不会因为局限在女主一个人身上而无聊，而且女主的金手指也没有说凭空来的，不是什么重生后就莫名有了系统的文（系统是大家都有的）总之就是好看好看好看，作者大大加油＾０＾~"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1663718461,"group_id":"7106673737700740108","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"希望不要扑街的小白写手，10多年的老书虫，超爱小说！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nz22qpzPWYKvDvgawAMuOJ0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/47a100830f55417887b1c28637b1bda5~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789638&x-signature=Z1xqV6ynJ9XTkpZ%2FHnVz2NZmgy4%3D","user_id":"13727190434","user_name":"沈洛锦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"13727190434","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7106673737700740108","book_info":{"abstract":"（天灾+囤货+寿命货币+卡牌+无cp）
